title: Frontend Developer (React) (Remote)
description: Role: Frontend Developer (React) (Remote) Location: Remote (Work from Anywhere) Job Type: Contract Payout: $30 - $100/hour Role Overview: We are hiring for one of our clients, seeking a Frontend Developer (React) to work on a contract basis. The role involves building and maintaining responsive web applications using modern frontend technologies. You will collaborate with cross-functional teams to deliver high-quality user interfaces and improve application performance. Key Responsibilities: • Develop and maintain user interfaces using React.js and related libraries • Implement responsive design principles to ensure compatibility across devices • Write clean, maintainable, and efficient JavaScript/TypeScript code • Collaborate with designers and backend developers to integrate frontend components with APIs • Optimize application performance and ensure cross-browser compatibility Required Skills & Qualifications: • Proficiency in React.js and modern frontend development tools • Strong understanding of JavaScript/TypeScript and state management • Experience with responsive design and CSS frameworks • Familiarity with RESTful APIs and frontend integration • Ability to write clean, modular, and maintainable code More About the Opportunity: This role offers a unique opportunity to work with a global leader in the Technology, Information and Internet industry, contributing to the development of scalable web applications. The project focuses on delivering seamless user experiences across multiple platforms. Equal Opportunity Employer: We hire based on skills and expertise. All qualified candidates are welcome regardless of background, experience, or prior employment history. Applications are reviewed solely on demonstrated technical ability and qualifications. Apply Now!

title: Node.js Developer (Remote)
description: Role : Node.js Developer (Remote) Location : Remote (Work from Anywhere) Job Type: Contract Payout : $30 - $90/hour Role Overview: We are hiring for one of our clients, seeking a Node.Js Developer to work on a contract basis. The role involves building and maintaining scalable server-side applications using Node.js, ensuring high performance and reliability. You will collaborate with cross-functional teams to deliver efficient backend solutions. The contract duration is flexible, with potential for long-term engagement based on project needs. Equal Opportunity Employer: We hire based on skills and expertise. All qualified candidates are welcome regardless of background, experience, or prior employment history. Applications are reviewed solely on demonstrated technical ability and qualifications. Apply Now!

title: Fullstack Developer (React/Node.js) (Remote)
description: Role : Fullstack Developer (React/Node.js) (Remote) Location : Remote (Work from Anywhere) Job Type : Full-Time Payout : $230K - $280K/yr Role Overview: We are hiring for one of our clients, seeking a Fullstack Developer (React/Node.js) - US to work on a full-time basis. The role involves building and maintaining scalable web applications using modern JavaScript frameworks and backend services. You will collaborate with cross-functional teams to deliver high-quality software solutions. Key Responsibilities: • Develop and optimize full-stack applications using React.js for frontend and Node.js for backend services. • Design and implement RESTful APIs and database schemas to support application functionality. • Write clean, maintainable, and efficient code while adhering to best practices and coding standards. • Debug, troubleshoot, and resolve technical issues across the stack to ensure system reliability. • Participate in code reviews, architectural discussions, and sprint planning to drive continuous improvement. Required Skills & Qualifications: • Proficiency in React.js and Node.js with a strong understanding of their ecosystems. • Experience with frontend technologies such as HTML5, CSS3, and modern JavaScript (ES6+). • Familiarity with backend frameworks like Express.js and database systems such as PostgreSQL or MongoDB. • Knowledge of version control systems, particularly Git, and CI/CD pipelines. • Experience with testing frameworks (Jest, Mocha) and debugging tools. More About the Opportunity: This role offers a unique opportunity to work with a global leader in the Technology, Information and Internet industry, contributing to the development of mission-critical applications. The position provides exposure to cutting-edge technologies and collaborative problem-solving in a distributed team environment. Equal Opportunity Employer: We hire based on skills and expertise. All qualified candidates are welcome regardless of background, experience, or prior employment history. Applications are reviewed solely on demonstrated technical ability and qualifications. Apply Now!

title: Full Stack Engineer Intern
description: Do you dream of building beautiful and interactive web experiences? Are you passionate about bringing design mockups to life with code? We're looking for a talented and enthusiastic Full-Stack Intern to join our growing team! This internship is a great opportunity to gain real-world, hands-on experience while contributing meaningfully to exciting projects. You’ll work closely with designers and developers to bring ideas to life . Compensation: NONE 📆 Duration: 4 months 🌍 Remote As a full stack developer intern, you will: Collaborate closely with designers and other developers to transform design mockups into user-friendly and responsive web applications. Write clean, maintainable, and efficient code using React, TypeScript, Express, and SQL. Implement interactive features and user interfaces, ensuring a seamless user experience across desktop, tablet, and mobile devices. Develop and maintain back-end services and APIs, ensuring robust and scalable server-side logic. Learn and improve your skills in both front-end and back-end development, including API integration. Contribute to optimizing web applications for performance, scalability, and accessibility. Stay updated with the latest trends and technologies in full stack development. We are looking for someone who: Has a minimum of one year of dedicated learning experience in web development through online courses, bootcamps, or personal projects. Possesses a strong understanding of React, TypeScript, Express, and SQL, or has a strong desire to learn. Has a keen eye for detail and a commitment to writing clean, well-structured code. Enjoys challenges and is always eager to learn new things. Is a team player with excellent communication and collaboration skills. Why intern with us? This internship is not just about fetching coffee. You'll be given real-world responsibilities and the opportunity to make a genuine impact on our projects. We believe in fostering a culture of learning and mentorship, and you'll be surrounded by a team of passionate front-end developers who are eager to share their knowledge and expertise. Ready to join our team? If you're a highly motivated individual with a passion for front-end development, we encourage you to apply

title: Senior Python Backend Developer
description: Yuppo is an AI-powered child development application designed for parents with children aged 0–6. Backed by a team with a proven track record of building globally respected companies, Yuppo started its journey in Turkey as an ed-tech initiative and is now expanding internationally with a mission to democratize early childhood education. The first six years of life are the most critical for brain development and future success. That’s why we’re building a platform that combines science, technology, and creativity to support families during this foundational stage. If you're excited about building meaningful products, solving real societal problems through technology, and working alongside a talented and passionate team, we’d love to hear from you. yuppo.org 📰 News: Yuppo raises 25M TL to grow its early childhood platform Key Responsibilities *Lead the design, development, and maintenance of backend services using Python and FastAPI in a production environment, ensuring code quality and architectural consistency. *Own system design decisions, including service architecture, API contracts, scalability strategies, and reliability patterns. *Design, optimize, and maintain relational data models using PostgreSQL, including complex query optimization and performance tuning. *Deploy, operate, and oversee backend services on AWS, following established infrastructure and deployment patterns while improving cloud architecture where needed. *Design and maintain serverless components using AWS Lambda, ensuring scalability and cost efficiency. *Oversee backend services running on EC2 and containerized workloads deployed on ECS, ensuring stability and performance. *Define and enforce backend best practices, conduct code reviews, and provide technical mentorship to developers. *Collaborate closely with frontend and mobile developers to define API specifications, guide integrations, and resolve complex integration issues. *Lead monitoring, debugging, and troubleshooting efforts for production systems, including root cause analysis and performance improvements. *Identify technical debt and drive architectural improvements to enhance long-term scalability and maintainability. Bonus / Nice to Have *Experience in Flutter frontend development. *Strong familiarity with CI/CD pipelines, automated deployment processes, and infrastructure-as-code principles. *Experience designing scalable, cloud-native backend architectures and distributed systems. Required *Demonstrated technical leadership experience with at least 3+ years of professional backend development experience.

title: Mid Level Java Backend Developer
description: Savunma sanayii, operasyon teknolojileri ve yüksek ölçekli kurumsal sistemler alanında yürütülen yazılım projelerinde görev almak üzere, aşağıdaki niteliklere sahip takım arkadaşı aranmaktadır. ## Genel Nitelikler * Üniversitelerin Bilgisayar Mühendisliği, Yazılım Mühendisliği veya ilgili mühendislik bölümlerinden mezun, * Java teknolojileri ile backend geliştirme alanında en az 2 yıl deneyimli, * Spring Boot framework'ü ile proje geliştirmiş, * Mikroservis mimarisi konusunda bilgi sahibi, * RESTful servisler konusunda deneyimli, * PostgreSQL, MySQL veya benzeri ilişkisel veritabanları ile çalışmış, * Kafka, RabbitMQ veya benzeri mesajlaşma sistemleri hakkında bilgi sahibi, * Redis veya benzeri cache sistemleri konusunda bilgi sahibi, * Git versiyon kontrol sistemini etkin kullanabilen, * Docker ve container teknolojileri hakkında bilgi sahibi, * Yazılım geliştirme yaşam döngüsü, katmanlı mimari ve Clean Code prensiplerine hakim, * Analitik düşünme ve problem çözme yetkinliği güçlü, * Takım çalışmasına yatkın ve iletişim becerileri kuvvetli, * Erkek adaylar için askerlik hizmetini tamamlamış veya en az 2 yıl tecilli. # # Tercih Sebepleri * Spring Cloud bileşenleri ile deneyim sahibi olmak, * Event-driven architecture yapıları hakkında bilgi sahibi olmak, * Linux ortamlarında çalışma deneyimi, * CI/CD süreçlerine hakim olmak, * Dağıtık sistemler ve yüksek trafikli uygulamalarda görev almış olmak, * Üçüncü parti servis entegrasyonları geliştirmiş olmak, * ERP, POS, lojistik veya finansal teknoloji projelerinde görev almış olmak. ## İş Tanımı * Java Spring Boot tabanlı mikroservis uygulamalarının geliştirilmesi, * Mevcut backend servislerinin bakım, iyileştirme ve optimizasyon çalışmalarının yürütülmesi, * Mesajlaşma altyapıları üzerinden çalışan servislerin geliştirilmesi, * Veritabanı tasarımı ve performans iyileştirme çalışmalarına destek verilmesi, * Farklı sistemler ile entegrasyon süreçlerinde görev alınması, * Yazılım geliştirme süreçlerinde analiz, tasarım, geliştirme ve test faaliyetlerinin yürütülmesi. ## Çalışma Bilgileri * *Çalışma Yeri:* Ankara * *Çalışma Modeli:* Tam zamanlı / Ofisten * *Pozisyon Seviyesi:* Mid-Level İlgilenen adayların güncel özgeçmişlerini paylaşmaları rica olunur. info@valorasoft.com

title: Reaction Actor/Actress
description: TheSoul Group is a leading creator business platform positioned at the heart of the creator economy. Our original videos, animations, and editorial stories inspire audiences in 21 languages, across 60 platforms and 20 websites. Together with our network of 15,000 talented creators, we reach over 5 billion followers and generate more than 100 billion monthly views on social media. As a global powerhouse in digital media, we drive viral success for creators and brands worldwide through a wide range of services, leveraging our expertise in content distribution, localization, and social media management. We're the creators behind global phenomena such as 5-Minute Crafts and BrightSide, and we continue to expand our influence in the creator economy through strategic acquisitions like Mediacube and Underscore Talent. We're a dynamic, remote-first global team, fostering award-winning creativity, a no-red-tape approach, and great vibes! We are looking for a charismatic, high-energy Video Creator / Reaction Actor to become the face of our content. In this role, you will record expressive, engaging reaction videos from your home studio (using a clean background or a green screen). You won't just be reading lines—we want a true creator who can take a concept, inject their own personality, and make it feel 100% authentic and relatable to our audience. Key Responsibilities: Perform & Deliver: Act in video content productions across a range of formats, primarily reaction-style videos Prepare: Review scripts, briefs, and creative direction provided by the team before shooting Collaborate: Partner with directors, content leads, and editors to nail the vision Own the Brand Voice: Deliver performances that align with our brand's tone, energy, and audience expectations Be Adaptable: Participate in quick reshoots or pick-up recording sessions when needed Stay Professional: Maintain a reliable, organized, and timely presence throughout production Contribute Creatively: Provide feedback on scripts or creative concepts—we want your input! Requirements A natural on-camera presence with high energy and expressive facial reactions A solid home-recording setup (good lighting, clear audio, and a clean background/green screen) The ability to take a script suggestion and ad-lib/tweak it so it sounds like you Benefits Competitive Salary: We respect the candidate's competence, so we discuss the salary individually and offer a truly competitive one, along with performance-based bonuses Flexible Work Options: Work from home, your favorite café, or anywhere that sparks your creativity. Enjoy the freedom with remote work options that fit your lifestyle Creative Vibes and an International Team: 80% of our employees are creators working from 70+ countries, producing awesome content for billions of followers worldwide Talent Growth: Engage in transparent knowledge sharing within the company and our internal academy, offering 470+ courses—learn, teach, or both, and shape your path to expertise TheSoul Approach: An ecosystem that fuels new ideas, promotes transparent task management, rewards employee's achievements, empowers flexible collaboration without time constraints or meetings— just action! We appreciate your interest in our job opportunities and our company. Our team carefully evaluates each application to identify the most suitable candidates for the role. Due to the high volume of applications received, we may not be able to respond to every applicant. However, if your qualifications align with our requirements, we will contact you to discuss the next steps in the selection process.
